results.title: Stock Market Today (May 1, 2026): Nasdaq, S&P 500 jump again after record closes
Stock Market Today (LIVE): Apple Jumps 3% on Earnings Beat and Pushes S&P 500 Above 7,200 to Start May
May Starts Merrily on Apple Earnings, Peace Hopes
CNBC Daily Open: May Day dawns
Stock Market Today, May 1: Tech Stocks Soar on Apple Earnings
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for May 1

summary_raw: S&P 500 +0.54%, Dow +0.37%, Nasdaq +0.69%, Russell 2000 +2.21%. S&P crossed 7,200. Apple +3% on earnings beat. April sealed 10% gains for S&P 500, best month in 5 years. Oil fell on Middle East peace hopes.
